title: mls: room_hpke_keypair shared key misuse risk for sealed_whisper
description: room_hpke_keypair() derives a shared HPKE key all group members can compute. A future contributor building sealed_whisper might call this assuming it provides per-user sealing, breaking sender anonymity within the group. Function should be renamed to group_shared_hpke_keypair() so the shared-by-all-members property is visible at the call site.
